text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer is here, and with the Kikuka Sho
approaching, we have our work cut out for us. As
the bus sets off for summer camp, we seem to be
travelling in an auspicious direction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru delights in her good
fortune—until the bus overshoots good fortune
and heads toward misfortune.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Expecting all sorts of hardships at camp,
Matikanefukukitaru falls into despair.
